mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sections (id, chapter_id, title, video_url, duration_seconds, order_index) VALUES
(#{section.id}, #{section.chapterId}, #{section.title}, #{section.videoUrl}, #{section.durationSeconds}, #{section.orderIndex})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sections WHERE chapter_id IN (SELECT id FROM chapters WHERE course_id = #{courseId})
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.chapter_id, s.title, s.video_url, s.duration_seconds, s.order_index FROM sections s INNER JOIN chapters c ON s.chapter_id = c.id WHERE c.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY s.order_index
